meta.description: SCA and SAST share one scope via (labels OR). fixed_within_sla_period: resolved in the rolling window and resolved on/before introduced+SLA days by severity (14/30/90/180). Validate date math in Jira Issue Navigator — if native JQL rejects 'field + Nd', add a calculated SLA due field or Automation flag and query that instead.
meta.window: Rolling ~24h uses Jira relative -1d on created/resolved (approximate). Use {{ROLLING_START_ISO}} and {{NOW_ISO}} in JQL for exact UTC window substitution.
meta.timeseries: jira_kpi_timeseries.py substitutes {{DAY_START}} and {{DAY_END}} per calendar day in the configured timezone (yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm). Backlog breach counts are point-in-time: only filled on the last row of a run unless you disable --backlog-on-last-only.
meta.sla_fixed_within: core_queries.fixed_within_sla_period is empty by default: Jira Cloud enhanced JQL rejects `+` after quoted date fields (CHANGE-2046). Add JQL that your site accepts (e.g. automation field SLA met) or use Issue Navigator to validate.

base_scope: project in (AH, AM, DAT, OAA, CMA, CD, RS, ECL, CL, MKT, CSI, DX, AO, SS, VB, VP, COMS, GROW, EXP)

core_queries.found_period: (labels = "vulnerability/sca" OR labels = "vulnerability/sast") AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND created >= -1d
core_queries.fixed_period: (labels = "vulnerability/sca" OR labels = "vulnerability/sast") AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND resolution IS NOT EMPTY AND resolved >= -1d
core_queries.fixed_total_period: (labels = "vulnerability/sca" OR labels = "vulnerability/sast") AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND resolution IS NOT EMPTY AND resolved >= -1d

core_queries_daily.found_period: (labels = "vulnerability/sca" OR labels = "vulnerability/sast") AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND created >= "{{DAY_START}}" AND created < "{{DAY_END}}"
core_queries_daily.fixed_period: (labels = "vulnerability/sca" OR labels = "vulnerability/sast") AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND resolution IS NOT EMPTY AND resolved >= "{{DAY_START}}" AND resolved < "{{DAY_END}}"
core_queries_daily.fixed_total_period: (labels = "vulnerability/sca" OR labels = "vulnerability/sast") AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND resolution IS NOT EMPTY AND resolved >= "{{DAY_START}}" AND resolved < "{{DAY_END}}"

named_backlog_queries.sca_sla_breach_critical_open: labels = "vulnerability/sca" AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND status not in (Done, Archived, Rejected) AND "Severity[Dropdown]" = Sev-0 AND ("vulnerability_introduced_date[Date]" < -14d)
named_backlog_queries.sca_sla_breach_high_open: labels = "vulnerability/sca" AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND status not in (Done, Archived, Rejected) AND "Severity[Dropdown]" = Sev-1 AND ("vulnerability_introduced_date[Date]" < -30d)
named_backlog_queries.sca_sla_breach_medium_open: labels = "vulnerability/sca" AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND status not in (Done, Archived, Rejected) AND "Severity[Dropdown]" = Sev-2 AND ("vulnerability_introduced_date[Date]" < -90d)
named_backlog_queries.sca_sla_breach_low_open: labels = "vulnerability/sca" AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND status not in (Done, Archived, Rejected) AND "Severity[Dropdown]" = Sev-3 AND ("vulnerability_introduced_date[Date]" < -180d)
named_backlog_queries.sast_sla_breach_critical_open: labels = "vulnerability/sast" AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND status not in (Done, Archived, Rejected) AND "Severity[Dropdown]" = Sev-0 AND ("vulnerability_introduced_date[Date]" < -14d)
named_backlog_queries.sast_sla_breach_high_open: labels = "vulnerability/sast" AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND status not in (Done, Archived, Rejected) AND "Severity[Dropdown]" = Sev-1 AND ("vulnerability_introduced_date[Date]" < -30d)
named_backlog_queries.sast_sla_breach_medium_open: labels = "vulnerability/sast" AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND status not in (Done, Archived, Rejected) AND "Severity[Dropdown]" = Sev-2 AND ("vulnerability_introduced_date[Date]" < -90d)
named_backlog_queries.sast_sla_breach_low_open: labels = "vulnerability/sast" AND labels = "vulnerability/fixable" AND labels != "vulnerability/ignored" AND status not in (Done, Archived, Rejected) AND "Severity[Dropdown]" = Sev-3 AND ("vulnerability_introduced_date[Date]" < -180d)
